use_cases: Form submission triggers in web applications
Icon-based quick action buttons in toolbars
ai_summary: A reusable button component with CVA (class-variance-authority) support for multiple variants including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles. Features configurable sizes (default, small, large, icon) with Radix UI Slot for composition. Includes built-in focus-visible ring accessibility features and disabled states.
